creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Curiously, Firefox bug seems to block at least one restricted bug which may (or may not) be due to a security issue in SQLite. How important it is one can guess based on their opsec practice: visibly linked, not backported to 57.0 (yet?).

https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1544153
https://wiki.mozilla.org/Security/Bug_Approval_Process
